title: midnight-craving bitter greek lamb tagine
description: A twist on traditional greek cuisine with bitter notes from preserved lemons.

ingredients.name: boneless lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: trim excess fat and cut into 1-inch cubes

ingredients.name: preserved lemons
ingredients.notes: chopped, rind and pulp separated (see note)

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together allspice, cumin, and paprika. Add lemon rind and whisks until well combined.
Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Brown lamb in batches, 2-3 minutes per batch, until browned on all sides.
Remove lamb from pot and set aside.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add preserved lemon pulp, broth, and spice mixture to pot. Stir to combine.
Return lamb to pot and bring mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes, until lamb is tender.
Fluff with a fork and season with salt and pepper.
Stir in parsley and oregano, and serve with honey, if desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
